detail: Unreferenced legacy orchestrator; UniversalGameRouter documents it as replaced.
Unreferenced legacy orchestrator; game-shell flow appears to have superseded it.
Re-export shared UI primitives currently imported directly from pages and layouts.
Create a public notation/staff surface before moving files into a dedicated feature.
Replace repeated deep relative imports from pages and App routes.
Provide one public module-content entry point while internal moves are in progress.
Export feature-owned game overlay, constants, and orchestration APIs from one boundary.
Move into src/features/game/components because it is used alongside GameOverlay on HomePage and PracticePage.
Move into a guitar feature boundary with its fretboard.js dependency and note-mapping logic.
Move into a notation/editor feature boundary; it is route-scoped and owns Monaco integration.
Move under theory/course-content ownership because it embeds module topics and theory/harmony composition.
Replace LazyExoticComponent<ComponentType<any>> with a shared game component prop contract.
Introduce typed abcjs event payloads instead of casting note events to any.
Replace any-based refs/control objects with local interfaces.
Add narrow interfaces for navigator audioSession, webkitAudioContext, and abcjs synth context access.
Split Monaco so the editor bundle only loads on the ABC editor route.
Wrap VexFlow-backed rendering behind a lazy boundary for optional staff views.
Split fretboard.js from the default route bundle and lazy load test/tooling surfaces.
App.css contains only starter-template selectors; remove or merge any surviving root layout rule into index.css.
Remove unused exports hasBrowserId and clearBrowserId after confirming no external runtime usage.
